title: Invert Binary Tree
problem_statement: Invert a binary tree by swapping left and right children recursively.

examples.explanation: The left and right subtrees are swapped at every node.

constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [0, 100]
intuition: Recursively swap children for every node in the tree.

approaches.name: Recursive subtree swap
approaches.description: Swap left and right pointers and recurse on both children.
approaches.why_not: Iterative BFS also works but recursion is simpler here.

interview_qa.q: What must be swapped at each node?
interview_qa.a: The left and right child pointers.
No, you can swap before or after recursing as long as both children are processed.
